title: ISSB, SEC, Others Hold Training on Standards - FinancialEDGE
description: The International Sustainability Standards Board (ISSB), in collaboration with the Financial Reporting Council of Nigeria (FRCN), the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), NGX Regulation Limited (NGX RegCo) and EY, presents a two-day technical training programme designed to support high-quality disclosures by helping preparers understand the requirements of the ISSB Standards. The training is scheduled to
html: The International Sustainability Standards Board (ISSB), in collaboration with the Financial Reporting Council of Nigeria (FRCN), the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), NGX Regulation Limited (NGX RegCo) and EY, presents a two-day technical training programme designed to support high-quality disclosures by helping preparers understand the requirements of the ISSB Standards.
